title: calliandra schottii subsp. rosei
intro: Calliandra schottii subsp. rosei, also known as the Mexican powder puff or bird of paradise, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Calliandra schottii subsp. rosei include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever and inflammation, and support digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for various purposes, including skin care and respiratory issues.
